helmet.title: What is Forex Rebate? Get Your Trading Cost Refunds | FXPayout
helmet.description: FXPayout is a trusted forex rebate platform providing up to 90% cashback on broker commissions, paid directly to traders.

definition.title: What is Forex Rebate?
definition.paragraph: A Forex rebate is a partial refund of the commission or spread from every trading transaction. You continue to trade as usual with your broker, but a portion of your trading costs is returned to you as a rebate.

cards.title: Rebate Benefits
cards.paragraph: Spread, leverage, and execution remain exactly the same as a standard account. With rebates, you can reduce trading costs and potentially increase your long-term profits.

cards.title: How Rebate Works
cards.paragraph: Every time you trade, the broker shares a portion of the commission with fxpayout as an IB. This commission is then returned to your account as a withdrawable rebate.

howRebate.title: How to Get Rebates
howRebate.paragraph: When you open a Forex trading account (or link an existing one) through us, your broker pays us a rebate for your trading activity.

howWorks.title: How Does It Work?
howWorks.paragraph: Forex rebates work automatically behind the scenes. You trade as usual, while fxpayout manages the return of a portion of your trading commissions.

flows.title: Trader
flows.paragraph: The trader executes trades as usual through their chosen broker with no changes to spread, leverage, or trading strategy.

flows.title: Broker
flows.paragraph: The broker receives the spread or commission from each trade, then shares a portion of it with fxpayout as an Introducing Broker (IB).

flows.title: FXPAYOUT
flows.paragraph: fxpayout returns a portion of the received commission to the trader as transparent and regular rebate payments.

payment.title: Rebate Payment System
payment.paragraph: fxpayout provides various flexible and accessible rebate payment methods. You can choose your preferred withdrawal method with low minimum limits and a transparent process.

schedule.title: Rebate Schedule
schedule.paragraph: Find the rebate payment schedule based on your trading broker. Click "View Schedule" for full details on each broker.
